---
name: Create a meta thread, based on a review request
about: For use by APA chairs and staff to set up the discussion space for reviewers
title: REPLACE_WITH_TITLE_OF_SPEC
labels: review-meta-thread
assignees: ''
---

This issue provides a space for reviewers to discuss a review that has been requested - the detailed review request is:

§ https://github.com/w3c/a11y-request/issues/___

Any issues that you find, that you think APA WG should raise, should be proposed separately, following the [APA Members' review guide](https://github.com/w3c/apa/blob/main/process/spec-review-guide.md).

Please ping the chairs (preferably via email) if you have any questions/concerns about the process - we aim to make continual improvements.
